name: Wavelet
description: Pearls strung along a serpentine curve — the wave holds its course while every bead swells, glows and dims to the rhythm of the seed.

code.style: --pearl: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( @place-cell: @plot(x: (t-π)/π*.9; y: sin(t*2.5)*.45); @size: calc(@rand(440, 1200) * 1px / @I); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--pearl); opacity: @rand(0.45, 1); transition: ease 700ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: 1x${beads}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
